name: python3-feedparser
title: python3-feedparser
description:
Universal Feed Parser for Python 3
Python module for downloading and parsing syndicated feeds. It can
handle RSS 0.90, Netscape RSS 0.91, Userland RSS 0.91, RSS 0.92, RSS
0.93, RSS 0.94, RSS 1.0, RSS 2.0, Atom, and CDF feeds.
.
It provides the same API to all formats, and sanitizes URIs and HTML.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-feedparser because Universal Feed Parser for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-feedparser as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-feedparser with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-feedparser --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
